meta.notice: Timeline curves use dated or season-allocated records only. Multi-year aggregate assertions are retained for provenance but are not plotted at an arbitrary endpoint.
meta.competitionNotice: Competition editions are named and require a documented appearance or bench listing. Generic aggregate columns are resolved from cited footnotes or excluded; reported honours without participation evidence are not counted as wins.
meta.expansionNotice: Nine-player expansion uses career-spanning club tables and complete senior national-team match ledgers allocated to selectable competition families. Competition-edition honours reconciliation remains partial where club aggregate rows cannot identify a named edition.
